recommendations.title: Starter for 10
recommendations.overview: In 1985, against the backdrop of Thatcherism, Brian Jackson enrolls in the University of Bristol, a scholarship boy from seaside Essex with a love of knowledge for its own sake and a childhood spent watching University Challenge, a college quiz show.

recommendations.title: Me and You and Everyone We Know

recommendations.title: Extraordinary Measures

recommendations.title: Richard Pryor: Live in Concert
recommendations.overview: Richard Pryor delivers monologues on race, sex, family and his favorite target—himself, live at the Terrace Theatre in Long Beach, California.

recommendations.title: Switched for Christmas
recommendations.overview: Identical twins Kate and Chris Lockhart plot to be the other sister – at Kate’s office and Chris’ school – and take on planning their sister’s Christmas events. One rule, though: no romance.
